metadata.title: Uptown Girl
metadata.lyrics:
[00:08.48] Uptown girl
[00:10.73] She's been living in her uptown world
[00:14.30] I bet she never had a backstreet guy
[00:17.82] I bet her momma never told her why
[00:21.63] I'm gonna try for an uptown girl (uptown girl)
[00:25.48] She's been living in her white-bread world (white-bread world)
[00:29.27] As long as anyone with hot blood can (hot blood can)
[00:33.25] And now, she's looking for a downtown man (downtown man)
[00:36.79] That's what I am
[00:38.73] And when she knows
[00:40.97] What she wants from her time (from her time)
[00:45.66] And when she wakes up (she wakes up)
[00:48.95] And makes up her mind
[00:53.13] She'll see I'm not so tough
[00:56.55] Just because I'm in love with an uptown girl (uptown girl)
[01:01.94] You know I've seen her in her uptown world (uptown world)
[01:06.10] She's getting tired of her high-class toys (high-class toys)
[01:10.16] And all her presents from her uptown boys (uptown boys)
[01:13.97] She's got a choice
[01:15.82] Oh, oh-oh-oh
[01:23.28] Oh, oh-oh-oh
[01:29.95] Uptown girl
[01:32.21] You know I can't afford to buy her pearls
[01:35.73] But maybe someday when my ship comes in
[01:39.71] She'll understand what kind of guy I've been (I've been)
[01:43.57] And then, I'll win
[01:45.69] And when she's walking
[01:48.49] She's looking so fine
[01:52.89] And when she's talking
[01:55.72] She'll say that she's mine
[02:00.33] She'll say I'm not so tough (she's wrong)
[02:04.38] Just because I'm in love with an uptown girl
[02:09.65] She's been living in her white-bread world
[02:13.14] As long as anyone with hot blood can
[02:17.11] And now, she's looking for a downtown man
[02:20.79] That's what I am
[02:22.82] Oh, oh-oh-oh
[02:30.19] Oh, oh-oh-oh
[02:37.15] Uptown girl (going uptown)
[02:40.02] She's my uptown girl (going uptown)
[02:42.71] Don't you know I'm in love with an uptown girl? (Going uptown)
[02:46.92] My uptown girl (she's my uptown girl, going uptown)
[02:51.89] Don't you know I'm in love with an uptown girl? (Going uptown)
[02:53.27] My uptown girl (she's my uptown girl, going uptown)
[02:54.95] Don't you know I'm in love with an uptown girl? (Going uptown)
[02:57.24] My uptown girl (she's my uptown girl, going uptown)
[03:01.51] (Don't you know I'm in love) with an uptown girl? (Going uptown)
[03:03.55] My uptown girl (she's my uptown girl, going uptown)
[03:09.29]
